summary: Frontend-only testing of Learn and Drive static website. All core sections loaded correctly. Page title, meta description, SEO JSON-LD, all 5 nav links, hero section, stats bar, services bento grid, reviews, contact with Google Maps, and footer all working. Mobile responsive at 375px. Several data-testid attributes are missing from key elements.

issues: Hero image shows a person with a paint brush/tool - not clearly a motorcycle/riding context. Could be more relevant to 2-wheeler driving school

action_items: Add data-testid='cta-call-button' to the Call Now navbar button
Add data-testid='hero-headline' to the hero headline element
Add data-testid='book-demo-button' to the Book a Free Demo button
Add data-testid='view-courses-button' to the View Courses button
Add data-testid='stats-bar' to the stats bar section
Add data-testid='why-choose-us-section' to the Why Choose Us section
Consider replacing hero image with one more clearly depicting motorcycle/riding
critical_code_review_comments: 6 missing data-testid attributes on key interactive/informational elements: cta-call-button, hero-headline, book-demo-button, view-courses-button, stats-bar, why-choose-us-section
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static website, no auth. All major sections verified working. Only missing data-testid attributes need to be added. Test at https://rider-training-pro.preview.emergentagent.com
